name: Custom Checkpoint Names Multi Checkpoint Pipeline
description: Workflow with non-SDLC checkpoint names and multiple milestone boundaries.
outcome: Custom milestone names work without any stage or role hardcoding.

definition.process_instructions: The lane framer defines the intake package. The executor builds the evidence set. Assessors clear it. The finish coordinator assembles the final launch pack across custom-named checkpoints.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.
